title: Meeting of Fate
overview: Beast Tamer Rein is kicked out of the Hero's party, but his fortunes change when he meets the Cat Spirit, Kanade!

title: Comrades
overview: Rein learns the full implications of his contract with Kanade while doing basic jobs for the Adventurer's Guild.

title: Another Ultimate Species
overview: An open job for the Guild pits Rein and Kanade against the Guard Dog of Stride Bridge... a violent raider with a surprising identity!

title: Dragonoid Power
overview: With Tania added to the team, Rein unlocks new power and takes the team on a series of new quests!

title: Beast Tamer VS Hero
overview: Rein and his new friends are forced to reckon with the Hero's party, who want him back for their own purposes!

title: The Lost Woods
overview: When Rein's next job comes from the Hero himself, he and his party attempt to conquer the aptly named "Lost Woods."

title: The Captive Fairy
overview: The party forges a plan to save Runa from the Shadow Knight, but receives an unexpected reception back in town.

title: Let's Make Weapons
overview: With his reward fresh in hand, Rein goes shopping at the best weapons shop in town. But there's something off about the old dwarf's wares...

title: Beast Tamer VS Beast Tamer
overview: In order to stop a group of mine thieves, Rein must fight another beast tamer, who has an unexpected creature in his repertoire!

title: Darkness in Horizon
overview: While defending Sora and Runa from a demanding aristocrat, Rein learns of an insidious darkness in the city of Horizon.

title: Black Waves
overview: While attempting to rescue the kidnapped townspeople and find proof of the lord's wrongdoing, Rein and his comrades make an unexpected discovery.

title: Champion
overview: After the demon reveals himself, Rain and his friends must not only fight for their own lives, but also protect the townsfolk. Will they succeed by joining forces?

title: A Home for All
overview: The town is rebuilding in the wake of the demon's attack, which means there's just one more thing for Rein to do...
